name: Timeline for full law firm AEO rollout?

mainEntity.name: Timeline for full law firm AEO rollout?

acceptedAnswer.description: **4-12 weeks: research, content, testing, iteration.**[2][3] **Key factors:** 1. Team size. 2. Site speed. **Phase: week 1 Qs, week 4 publish.**[4] Realistic pace.[9]
